selectTimeSlot.normal: Select the first event for the event type you are going to apply for
selectTimeSlot.event: Select the time slot of the event which you are applying for
selectTimeSlot.recurring: Select the time slot when you want to start your event

confirmDetailStep.specificT&C: Please read and agree to the terms and conditions before registering for this event.

pickTuitionStep.recurTuitionReminder: The organizer may have set some dates as unavailable. Therefore, some of the events may be delayed until the next week.

payment.success: Your event application has been submitted. A confirmation email will be sent to you shortly.
payment.failure: Your event application has failed. Please contact the organizer directly.
payment.incomplete: You have not completed all steps. Please return and select event type, time, and fee options.
payment.waitingPayment: You have submitted the form. Please complete the payment to confirm your registration.
